build.buildCommand: NODE_ENV=development pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @project/db exec prisma generate && pnpm sdk:generate && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter server build

deploy.preDeployCommand: pnpm --filter @project/db exec prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate && pnpm --filter @project/db exec tsx prisma/seed.ts
